cases.description: Incoming reviewer comment triggers the skill, not codi-code-review
cases.prompt: The reviewer left this comment on my PR: 'You're not handling the null case in parseUser at line 42.' How should I respond?
expectations: Activates codi-receiving-code-review (not codi-code-review or codi-pr-review)
Verifies the claim by reading parseUser at the cited line BEFORE proposing any action
States the verdict explicitly (correct / partial / wrong / unclear)
Does NOT respond with 'You're absolutely right!' or 'Good catch!'

cases.description: Pasted automated-review output triggers the skill
cases.prompt: Coderabbit posted three findings on PR #142 — let me know how to address them.
expectations: Activates codi-receiving-code-review
Treats automated-tool output as a technical claim that requires verification — not authoritative
Verifies each finding against the actual code before recommending action
Replies per-finding, not in one bulk acknowledgment

cases.description: When the reviewer claim is wrong, push back with evidence
cases.prompt: Reviewer says: 'This function has no error handling.' But I already added a try/catch on line 38. Should I just apply their fix anyway to keep things smooth?
expectations: Recognizes the reviewer's claim does not match the code
Recommends evidence-based pushback citing the existing try/catch at the specific line
Refuses to apply a change that would be incorrect even when the reviewer is senior or to avoid friction
Does NOT recommend silent acceptance

cases.description: Ambiguous feedback prompts a clarifying question, not a change
cases.prompt: The reviewer wrote 'this could be cleaner' on the auth module. What do I do?
expectations: Recognizes the comment is ambiguous and not actionable
Asks one specific clarifying question
Does NOT make any code change yet
Does NOT guess at what the reviewer meant and apply a speculative fix

cases.description: Producing a review (not consuming) routes to codi-code-review
cases.prompt: Review my changes to billing.ts before I commit.
expectations: Does NOT activate codi-receiving-code-review
Routes to codi-code-review (uncommitted diff, producing side)

cases.description: Producing a full PR review routes to codi-pr-review
cases.prompt: Post a severity-ranked review on PR #142 with findings doc and gh comment.
expectations: Does NOT activate codi-receiving-code-review
Routes to codi-pr-review (full PR review, producing side)

cases.description: Pre-reviewer completeness check routes to codi-verification
cases.prompt: Before I push this, verify the changes work as intended.
expectations: Does NOT activate codi-receiving-code-review (no reviewer feedback yet)
Routes to codi-verification (own pre-review check)

cases.description: When the reviewer is right, accept tersely without padding
cases.prompt: Reviewer pointed out a real bug at line 88 — the date is parsed as local time but should be UTC. They're correct. How should I respond?
expectations: Recommends a terse acknowledgment ('Fixed at line 88') rather than 'You're absolutely right!'
Recommends adding a regression test for the timezone bug
Does NOT recommend rewriting unrelated code while fixing the reported bug
